prompt: Modify image 1 to reduce wrinkles and dryness, applying the smoother, youthful texture seen in the reference for improved skin condition and photorealistic appearance.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Reduce the visible wrinkles and dryness across the skin surface in image 1 by applying the smoother, youthful, and hydrated skin texture observed in image 2 (reference image). The final output should maintain a photorealistic appearance, reflecting an improved skin condition.
